package rulefixtures

import (
	"encoding/base64"
)

// scenario for base64_decode_string_in_loop: Base64 decode from string inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario438Positive(values []string) int {
	total := 0
	for _, value := range values {
		decoded, _ := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(value)
		total += len(decoded)
	}
	return total
}
